name: Anshan Hifichem Co., Ltd.
summary: Anshan Hifichem Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells high performance organic pigments, solvent dyestuff, and intermediates in China. The company serves a range of customers in the ink, coating, and plastic industries, as well as in electronic products, paper-coloring, and seed coloring industries. Anshan Hifichem Co., Ltd. is headquartered in Anshan, China.
